basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Research Fellow and Administrative Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.post_name: Senior Research Fellow and Administrative Assistant

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max 35 years for Senior Research Fellow, Max 45 years for Administrative Assistant.
age_limit.details: Senior Research Fellow: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Administrative Assistant: Maximum age limit is 45 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Basic Science or Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in a professional course selected through National Eligibility Tests (CSIR-UGC, NET, GATE) or through national level examinations. 2 years of research experience required. For Administrative Assistant, Master in Scientific discipline.
qualification.details: Senior Research Fellow: Postgraduate degree in Basic Science Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in professional course selected through a process described through any one of the following: a) Scholars who are selected through National Eligibility Tests- CSIR-UGC, NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE. b) The selection process through National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their agencies and Institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER etc. 2 years of research experience is essential Administrative Assistant: Master in Scientific discipline from a recognized university

salary_details.details: Senior Research Fellow: Rs 42,000 + 27% HRA (Monthly) Administrative Assistant: Rs 35,400/- (Consolidated) (Monthly)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the AIIMS Delhi recruitment is 21st June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Senior Research Fellow and Administrative Assistant?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by AIIMS Delhi for these positions, with one vacancy for Senior Research Fellow and one for Administrative Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: For the Senior Research Fellow position, candidates need a Postgraduate degree in Basic Science or a Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in a professional course selected through national eligibility tests or national level examinations, along with 2 years of research experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Administrative Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Administrative Assistant post is 45 years. Candidates should ensure they fall within this age bracket to be eligible.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The Senior Research Fellow will receive a monthly salary of Rs 42,000 plus 27% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. How should I apply for these positions at AIIMS Delhi?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email to [email protected]. Make sure to clearly mention the post you are applying for in the subject line of your email.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned for this recruitment drive by AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the shortlisted candidates will involve an interview, which may also be conducted virtually.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Senior Research Fellow and Administrative Assistant at AIIMS Delhi are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
